title: Adopt Cloudflare D1 FTS5 for full-text search
context: D1 left beta with FTS5 support and per-Worker query latency that beat our hand-rolled R2-served index. Maintenance burden of the custom index has been higher than expected.
decision: Migrate the FTS index from the custom R2-served implementation (ADR-102) to D1 FTS5.
consequences: Removes a class of cold-query latency issues. Adds a new datastore (D1) to the operational surface. Migration is a one-off rebuild from R2 note bodies.

alternativesConsidered.name: Algolia
alternativesConsidered.reasonNotChosen: Cost ceiling and a new third-party dependency.

alternativesConsidered.name: Continue with the custom R2 index
alternativesConsidered.reasonNotChosen: Maintenance burden does not match team capacity.
